name: YouTube
longDescription:
YouTube is the world's largest video sharing platform, hosting everything from short clips and music videos to tutorials, documentaries, podcasts, and live broadcasts. Anyone can create a channel, upload videos, go live, and reach a global audience for free.

Viewers find content through search, recommendations, subscriptions, and the Shorts feed for vertical short-form video. Creators monetize through the YouTube Partner Program, channel memberships, Super Chats during live streams, and Shorts revenue. YouTube Premium offers ad-free viewing, background play, and access to YouTube Music.

Owned by Google, YouTube also serves as a primary platform for music streaming, gaming content, learning, and live events, with apps available across virtually every modern device.

features.title: Video uploads and streaming
features.description: Upload videos in resolutions up to 8K and stream live to a global audience for free.

features.title: Shorts
features.description: Create and watch vertical short-form videos in a dedicated feed alongside long-form content.

features.title: Channels and subscriptions
features.description: Subscribers receive notifications when their favorite creators publish new videos or go live.

features.title: Monetization
features.description: Eligible creators earn through ads, channel memberships, Super Chats, Super Thanks, and Shorts revenue.

features.title: YouTube Premium
features.description: An optional subscription removes ads, enables background play, and includes YouTube Music.

useCases: Watching tutorials, reviews, news, and entertainment from any creator
Building an audience as a creator with long-form videos and Shorts
Streaming live gameplay, events, or podcasts to a global audience
Listening to music videos and full albums through YouTube or YouTube Music

faq.question: Is YouTube free?
faq.answer: Yes, YouTube is free to watch with ads. YouTube Premium is an optional paid subscription that removes ads and adds extra features.

faq.question: Do I need an account to watch?
faq.answer: No, most videos can be watched without an account. A free Google account is required to subscribe, comment, or upload.

faq.question: How do creators get paid?
faq.answer: Through the YouTube Partner Program, which shares ad revenue, plus channel memberships, Super Chats, and Shorts revenue once eligibility thresholds are met.

faq.question: Can I watch YouTube offline?
faq.answer: YouTube Premium subscribers can download videos for offline viewing in the mobile apps.
